content:
熱病遺者，熱甚強食，穀氣與殘熱相薄也。食肉則復，多食則遺，此熱病之禁也。

  **所出**：《黃帝內經 · 素問第九卷》 — https://zh.wikisource.org/wiki/黃帝內經/素問第九卷

sources.title: 黃帝內經 · 素問第九卷

summary: The passage warns that in heat‑disease recovery, eating too much or consuming meat can provoke a “relapse” (遺), and such overindulgence is therefore forbidden.
title: 遺-之
